weather.forecast: Record-setting March heat wave with highs between 90-103°F across coastal plains, valleys and interior through March 19. Sacramento Valley 85-95°F.
weather.practical_note: Stay hydrated and limit outdoor activities during peak heat (11am-4pm). This is unseasonably hot for March.

ten_year_treasury.note: Down from Monday's close above 4.22% as Fed policy meeting kicked off

congress_trading.note: Recent trading activity tracked via Capitol Trades and Quiver Quantitative
congress_trading.disclaimer: STOCK Act requires disclosure within 45 days. Data reflects recent filings from March 10-12, 2026 period.

financial_times.headline: Middle East War: Dubai flights delayed or cancelled after latest drone and missile attacks
financial_times.summary: Regional travel hubs Doha and Abu Dhabi also severely constrained by fallout from conflict.

financial_times.headline: Top US counterterrorism official resigns over war against Iran
financial_times.summary: Joe Kent is first high-profile resignation over conflict he claims 'serves no benefit to the American people'.

reuters.headline: Live: Iran confirms security chief Larijani killed by Israel as Trump lashes out at NATO allies
reuters.summary: The US president's comments come after a growing list of nations, including many European powers, turned down his request to help protect the Strait of Hormuz.

reuters.headline: Business and Markets Coverage - March 17, 2026
reuters.summary: Comprehensive coverage of global markets as investors digest war developments and Fed policy meeting begins.

ny_times.headline: Israel Is Picking Off Iran's Leadership, but 'Decapitation Has Its Limits'
ny_times.summary: Ali Larijani's death highlighted how heavily Israel is relying on targeted killings to achieve its war aims. That approach can backfire.

ny_times.headline: Joe Kent, a Top U.S. Counterterrorism Official, Resigns Over the War in Iran
ny_times.summary: National Counterterrorism Center Director becomes highest-profile official to resign over the conflict.

bbc.headline: Iran confirms security chief Larijani killed by Israel
bbc.summary: Larijani has long been seen as one of the Islamic Republic's most experienced and influential policy makers.

bbc.headline: Italy warns stricken Russian tanker could explode in Med at any time
bbc.summary: Italy is one of nine EU countries urging the European Commission to act over the Arctic Metagaz drifting out of control in the Mediterranean Sea.

guardian.headline: UAE reopens airspace after Iran attack – as it happened
guardian.summary: Trump said the war would be 'wrapped up' soon, suggesting he would delay his upcoming trip to China by 'a month or so'.

guardian.headline: Lisa Nandy vows to give BBC permanent charter to prevent political interference
guardian.summary: Minister says the change is needed to protect the corporation from repeated 'culture war' attacks.

atlantic.headline: Everyone but Trump Understands What He's Done
atlantic.summary: Allied leaders know that any positive gesture they make will count for nothing.

atlantic.headline: Snorkeling in the Strait of Hormuz
atlantic.summary: With Iran threatening to attack, points of entry to the strait are ready to turn into sprawling maritime parking lots, filled with idle ships waiting for their escorts.

wired.headline: Meta Is Shutting Down Horizon Worlds on Meta Quest
wired.summary: Meta's flailing virtual reality social experience is being discontinued in June as part of broader moves to slim down the business.

wired.headline: The Tesla Influencers Leaving the 'Cult'
wired.summary: Elon Musk's politics and overblown hype about Full Self-Driving are turning some loyalists away.

techcrunch.headline: Build Mode Podcast - Survival guide for early-stage founders
techcrunch.summary: New episodes every Thursday featuring candid conversations and tactical advice from experienced founders.

the_verge.headline: Meta is shutting down its VR metaverse on June 15th
the_verge.summary: Company shifting to 'all-in on mobile' strategy for Horizon Worlds.

the_verge.headline: Tumblr reverts controversial reblog changes after user backlash
the_verge.summary: Changes that dramatically altered the function of the site's reblog feature are being reverted.

ai_developments.headline: Anthropic rolled out memory features to all Claude users
ai_developments.summary: Early March 2026: Claude can now retain context and preferences across conversations. Company also launched Claude Sonnet 4.6 and Opus 4.6 in February.

ai_developments.headline: Nvidia GTC 2026: AI and Robotics News
ai_developments.summary: Jensen Huang's keynote ongoing. Nvidia remains the backbone of AI chip production for OpenAI, Google and Anthropic.

design_ux.headline: 3 Tips to Make AI a Better Editor
design_ux.summary: Although AI is (usually) good at editing, good prompting practices shouldn't be ignored. These 3 tips will help take AI edits to the next level.

design_ux.headline: Design Process Isn't Dead, It's Compressed
design_ux.summary: As AI speeds up design work, the argument to 'throw out the process' misrepresents how experienced designers work.

design_ux.headline: The Methodological Problems Hiding in Your Research Tools
design_ux.summary: The methodological blind spots in UX research tools have always been a problem. Now that AI is planning and analyzing research, it's gotten worse.

surface_pattern_textile.headline: Trend Resources for Textile Designers: What's Out There and How to Use Them
surface_pattern_textile.summary: Guide to trend resources for textile designers. First lesson and WGSN registration available March 30, 2026.

surface_pattern_textile.headline: Scottish Art Nouveau from Charles & Margaret Mackintosh
surface_pattern_textile.summary: Exploration of Art Nouveau influences from the Mackintoshes and their impact on contemporary pattern design.

surface_pattern_textile.headline: Designer Feature: Saeideh Ghanbari
surface_pattern_textile.summary: Surface design patterns from Saeideh Ghanbari of Düsseldorf, Germany that work perfectly for home textiles and wallpaper markets.

graphic_design_merch.headline: Coinbase dials up the craft in cinematic new ad
graphic_design_merch.summary: Created by Isle of Any, the ad ran during yesterday's Oscars ceremony, offering a vision of financial freedom for those of us who are 'financial NPCs' in the computer game of life.

graphic_design_merch.headline: Inside Ramdane Touhami's magical world of retail
graphic_design_merch.summary: As the prolific designer behind hundreds of retail spaces, including the exquisite Officine Universelle Buly 1803 perfumeries, Ramdane Touhami is focused on craft, detail and delivering innovative products with authenticity.

graphic_design_merch.headline: The mentors who are helping others through redundancy
graphic_design_merch.summary: In the wake of creative industry redundancies, key voices are emerging to help those in career crisis navigate the messy middle and find a route through to the other side.

film_screenwriting.headline: 'Buffy' Autopsy Report: The Inside Story Of How High-Profile Reboot Was Shockingly Slayed
film_screenwriting.summary: Almost every day last week, the studios on Hulu and Oscar winner Chloé Zhao's 'Buffy the Vampire Slayer' reboot were in touch with the project's producers indicating a pickup seemed imminent. By 6 p.m. Friday, the project was dead.

film_screenwriting.headline: A24's 'Peaked' Adds Five To Cast
film_screenwriting.summary: A24's new comedy Peaked, from Molly Gordon and Allie Levitan, has cast five more in supporting roles including Amy Sedaris, Owen Thiele, and Jaya Harper.
